tr: {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Standard debt formula: AMT silver i-ser PN1 PN2 isu. Debtor before creditor. Most common debt pattern.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Debt with debtor patronymic. Debtor identified as PN1 son of PN2.

tr: {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN2_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Debt formula with ti-su (feminine creditor or variant) instead of i-su.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver is owed by {PN1_TR}.
notes: Debt using i-li-bi (in the charge of). No explicit creditor.

tr: {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Debt using i li-bi with explicit creditor.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver is owed by {PN1_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of silver is owed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Debt using i-na li-bi with patronymic.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver is owed by {PN1_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of tin owed by {PN1_TR}, the {OCC_TR}.
notes: Debt with debtor identified by occupation.

tr: {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of copper to {PN2_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of washed copper to {PN2_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of good copper to {PN2_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of sikku copper to {PN2_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of tin to {PN2_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of gold to {PN2_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of pasallum gold to {PN2_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of refined silver is with {PN1_TR}.
notes: Debt expressed as 'is with PN' using isti.

tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver is owed by our own {PN1_TR}.
notes: Debt from own business partner. ni-a-im = our own.

tr: Concerning {PN1_TR}'s debt of {AMT_TR} of refined silver.
notes: Debt reference using hubul (debt) + genitive. Common as preamble.

tr: Concerning {PN1_TR}'s debt.
notes: Short debt reference without specifying the amount.

tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} owe {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
{PN1_TR} and his wife owe {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Debtor and his wife as joint debtors.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er {PN1_TL} {PN2_TL} a-ší-tí-šu ú {PN3_TL} me-er-i-šu {PN4_TL} i-šu
tr: {AMT_TR} of silver {PN1_TR}, {PN2_TR} his wife, and {PN3_TR} his son owe to {PN4_TR}.
notes: Family debt: debtor, wife, and son. Anatolian debt where whole family is liable.

tr: {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN2_TR} and {PN3_TR}.
I owe {AMT_TR} of refined silver.
notes: First-person debt: i li-bi-a = in my charge.

tr: {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of silver, the price of a donkey, to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Price-of-donkey debt. Very common commodity price-debt.

tr: I owe {AMT_TR} of silver, the price of a donkey.
{AMT_TR} of silver from the price of sheep is owed by {PN1_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of silver, the price of copper, is owed by {PN1_TR}.
{PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of silver, the price of {COMM_TR}, to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Debt from price of a commodity (textile, wool, etc.).

tl: {AMT_TL} na-ru-uq ŠE.TA mì-iš-lam GIG mì-iš-lam ŠE-am iš-tí {PN1_TL}
tr: {AMT_TR} sacks of grain, half wheat half barley, is owed by {PN1_TR}.
notes: Grain debt in sacks, half wheat half barley.

tl: {AMT_TL} na-ru-uq mì-iš-lam ŠE-um mì-iš-lam5 ar-ša-tum i-na ha-ar-pé-e i-ma-da-ad
tr: He will measure out {AMT_TR} sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat at harvest time.
He (also) owes {AMT_TR} colored woolen fleeces.
1 textile, a dress, is owed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im {PLACE_TL} ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb
tr: If he does not pay when his term is up, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the {PLACE_TR} colony.

tl: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša {PN1_TL} {RATE_TL} GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
tr: From the week of {PN1_TR} he will add {RATE_TR} shekel of silver as interest per month.

tl: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
tr: Reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.
{PN1_TR} is satisfied with the silver and its interest.
notes: Creditor satisfied with principal and accrued interest.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver, an earlier interest.
He will pay within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
He will pay {AMT_TR} of silver within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
He is to pay within {DEADLINE_TR} months.
He will pay the silver in {DEADLINE_TR} months.
He will pay in {DEADLINE_TR} years.

tl: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
tr: Reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR} he will pay within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
notes: Week start + week deadline. Very common payment formula.

tl: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} ú {PN2_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
tr: Reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} he will pay within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
notes: Week start with two weekly officials + week deadline.

tl: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
tr: Reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} he is to pay within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.

tl: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal
tr: Reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR} he will pay within a month.
From month {MONTH_TR} he will pay within {DEADLINE_TR} months.

tl: iš-tù ITU.KAM {MONTH_TL} li-mì-im {EPONYM_TL} a-na ITU.{DEADLINE_TL}.KAM i-ša-qal
tr: From month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of {EPONYM_TR} he will pay within {DEADLINE_TR} months.
notes: Full start date (month + eponymy) + month deadline.

tl: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ITI.KAM i-ša-qal
tr: From the week of {PN1_TR} he will pay within {DEADLINE_TR} months.
When they have harvested, then they will pay the {AMT_TR} of silver.
He will pay at the {FEST_TR}.
He will pay to {PN1_TR} in {PLACE_TR}.
he will send me the silver to {PLACE_TR} in {DEADLINE_TR} months.
notes: Obligation to send silver to a location.

tl: lu iš-tù {PLACE_TL} ú-šé-ba-lam lu i-na ba-a-áb-tí-šu a-lá-qé
tr: he will send it me from {PLACE_TR} or I will take it from his outstanding claims.
notes: Alternative payment: send from place or take from claims.

tr: Month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy {EPONYM_TR}.
Month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of {EPONYM_TR} son of {PN1_TR}.
Month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of the successor of {EPONYM_TR}.
notes: Date with successor eponym. sha qate = successor.

tr: Month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of the successor of {EPONYM_TR}, son of {PN1_TR}.
Year eponymy of {EPONYM_TR}.
Eponymy after that of {EPONYM_TR} son of {PN1_TR}.
Contracted in month {MONTH_TR}.
From the week of {PN1_TR}, month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of {EPONYM_TR}.
He collected the silver during the eponymy of {EPONYM_TR}, in month {MONTH_TR}.
Month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy {EPONYM_TR}, the high priest.
If {PN1_TR} raises a claim against {PN2_TR}, {PN3_TR} will clear him.
notes: Guarantor clause: if PN1 claims from PN2, PN3 guarantees.

tr: If the sons of {PN1_TR} raise a claim against {PN2_TR}, {PN3_TR} will clear him.

tl: šu-ma ša ki-ma {PN1_TL} a-na {PN2_TL} i-tù-ru-ú {PN3_TL} ú-ba-áb-šu
tr: If {PN1_TR}'s representatives claim from {PN2_TR}, {PN3_TR} will clear him.
If {PN1_TR}, son of {PN2_TR}, has already been satisfied.
{PN1_TR} has been paid in full the silver and its accrued interest.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR šu-ku-bu-um ni-a-um i-na ša li-bi4 hu-bu-li-šu iš-qú-lam
tr: Our own Šu-Kūbum paid me {AMT_TR} of silver as part of his debt.
notes: Partial debt payment. Fixed debtor name but pattern is useful.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ṭup-pu-um a-num i-mu-at-ma {AMT_TL} {PN1_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: But if he has not paid, then this tablet is dead, and {PN1_TR} will have to pay {AMT_TR}.
notes: Tablet death clause: if debtor fails, tablet voided and penalty amount due.

tl: ṭup-pu-um ha-ar-mu-um ša hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
tr: A certified tablet concerning the debt of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} that may appear will be invalid.
notes: Old debt tablet invalidation. Used when debt is settled or transferred.

tl: ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ša {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ša hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL}
tr: an encased tablet of {AMT_TR} of silver, being the debt of {PN1_TR}.

tl: ṭup-pá-am ša {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ša hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL} a-na {PN2_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL} pá-qí-id
tr: A tablet concerning {AMT_TR} of silver, the debt of {PN1_TR}, has been entrusted to {PN2_TR} son of {PN3_TR}.
notes: Debt tablet entrusted to third party.

tl: i-na u4-mi-im ša ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL} a-na ša ki-ma {PN2_TL} ú-kà-lu-mu-ni
tr: On the day that they show the tablet concerning {PN1_TR}'s debt to {PN2_TR}'s representatives.
notes: Conditional: on the day the debt tablet is presented.

tr: {PN1_TR} received {AMT_TR} of silver.
He also received {AMT_TR} of silver.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im SÍG.HI.A ša {PN1_TL} {PN2_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL} il5-qé
tr: {PN2_TR} son of {PN3_TR} has received {AMT_TR} of refined silver from the proceeds of {PN1_TR}'s wool.
notes: Receipt of silver from wool proceeds.

tr: all this {PN1_TR} paid.
I gave {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN1_TR}.
notes: First person: I gave silver to PN.

tr: I gave {AMT_TR} of tin to {PN1_TR}'s possession.
I paid {AMT_TR} shekels of salt.
notes: Payment in salt. GÍN unit is embedded in TL; bare_number prevents doubled unit.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-šu-mì {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} áš-qúl
tr: {AMT_TR} of silver on behalf of {PN1_TR}, son of {PN2_TR}, I paid to {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}.
Thereof I gave {AMT_TR} to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Subtraction from a larger sum. SHABA = thereof.

tr: In the presence of {PN1_TR}, {PN2_TR} paid the copper to {PN3_TR}.
{PN1_TR} gave this silver.
concerning {AMT_TR} of silver, the working capital of {PN1_TR}.
I gave {AMT_TR} of silver for a working-capital to {PN1_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of 'dust silver' the capital of {PN1_TR}, son of {PN2_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of tin: the import duty of the palace.
notes: Palace import duty (nishatum). Common tax notation.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ší-im {AMT2_TL} AN.NA ni-is-ha-at {AMT3_TL} šu-uq-lá-tí-šu ša šé-ep {PN1_TL} áš-qúl
tr: I paid {AMT_TR} silver, the price of {AMT2_TR} tin, the excise tax of his {AMT3_TR} containers, under the transport of {PN1_TR}.
If he has not sent it he is to pay {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Penalty for failure to send goods.

tl: šu-ma lá uk-ta-in-šu-nu {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na {PN1_TL} {PN2_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: If he does not confirm their liability {PN2_TR} will pay to {PN1_TR} {AMT_TR} of refined silver.
notes: Penalty for failure to confirm liability.

tl: i-li-bi {PN1_TL} lá uk-ta-in KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-sú {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: he does not confirm that {PN1_TR} has it, {PN2_TR} will pay the silver and its interest to {PN3_TR}.
notes: If debtor doesn't confirm, guarantor pays principal + interest.

tr: If they do not satisfy (the creditor) he will take {PN1_TR} along.
notes: If debtors fail to pay, creditor takes a person (hostage/surety).

tl: šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na A-lim{ki} lá uš-ta-ak-ší-sú-um {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-na ṭup-pí-a i-ṣa-he-er
tr: If he has not let the silver reach him in the City, {AMT_TR} of silver will be deducted from my tablet.
notes: Penalty deduction from tablet if silver not delivered.

tr: The iron will be sold and {PN1_TR} will receive {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Named creditor receives proceeds from sale.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ša {PN1_TL} a-na DAM.GÀR-ri-im ha-bu-lu-ma šu-mì DAM.GÀR wa-du-ú {PN2_TL}
tr: for the {AMT_TR} of silver that {PN1_TR} owes to a merchant, the name of the merchant has been announced: {PN2_TR} is the merchant.
notes: Bearer = creditor: creditor merchant named explicitly.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver still remains.
Of this silver {AMT_TR} belong to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Share of silver belonging to a person.

tr: He will give me {AMT_TR} of silver and I shall lay claim to that.
In all {AMT_TR} of silver {PN1_TR} weighed out to us.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki ša {PN1_TL} a-na {PN2_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL} ni-ip-qí-id
tr: {AMT_TR} of silver sealed by {PN1_TR} we entrusted to {PN2_TR} son of {PN3_TR}.
notes: Sealed silver entrusted to a transporter.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ku ša {PN1_TL} a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-šu a-na me-er-e {PN2_TL} ni-ip-qí-id
tr: {AMT_TR} of silver sealed by {PN1_TR} we entrusted to {PN2_TR}'s sons in accordance with his instructions.
The hand of the creditor rests on {AMT_TR} {COMM_TR}.

tl: KÙ.BABBAR a-na È-tí-šu-nu ša {PLACE_TL} iš-qú-lu È-tù e-ru-ba-tù-a
tr: The silver they paid for their house in {PLACE_TR}, (which) house serves as my pledge.
notes: House used as pledge/security for debt.

tr: he must book {AMT_TR} of gold in the name of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Book gold (penalty) in someone's name. ilappat = write/book.

tl: šu-ma ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù {AMT_TL} KÙ.GI šu-mì {PN1_TL} i-lá-pá-at
tr: If they write his tablet, he must book {AMT_TR} of gold in the name of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Gold penalty if joint-stock tablet written.

tl: šu-ma lu-qú-tum a-na ša {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} lá i-tù-ar ší-im-šu-nu KÙ.BABBAR {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qá-al
tr: If the goods do not become the property of {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR}, he must pay the proceeds from their sale in silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Conditional: if goods don't sell, pay silver instead.

tl: ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ša {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ša hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL} a-ša-par-tim ú-kà-al
tr: an encased tablet of {AMT_TR} of silver, being the debt of {PN1_TR}, I hold as pledge.
I am holding {AMT_TR} of refined silver.

tl: {AMT_TL} URUDU ša i-ṣé-er {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} DUMU me-er-e {PN3_TL} {PN4_TL} i-šu-ú URUDU ki-ma {PN4_TL} {PN5_TL} me-ra-šu il5-qé
tr: {AMT_TR} of copper that {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} sons of {PN3_TR} owe to {PN4_TR} – on behalf of {PN4_TR} his son {PN5_TR} has received the copper.
notes: Copper debt collected by creditor's son on behalf.

tr: After {PN1_TR} died the attorney {PN2_TR} received {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Payment collected by attorney after debtor death.

tr: I gave {AMT_TR} of silver when {PN1_TR} married his wife.

tl: {AMT_TL} AN.NA ša ik-ri-bi4-a a-na ší-a-ma-tim a-na {PN1_TL} IGI {PN2_TL} a-dí-in
tr: I gave {AMT_TR} of tin from my votive offering for purchases to {PN1_TR} with {PN2_TR} as witness.
In all {AMT_TR} of gold and {AMT2_TR} of silver.
notes: Total sum in gold and silver.

tl: a-dí ší-ip-kà-at {PN1_TL} a-bi-šu KÙ.BABBAR i-na ší-ip-kà-tí-šu ú-ṣa-hi-ir
tr: As for the investments of his father {PN1_TR}, I deducted it from his investments.

tl: ší-tí KÙ.BABBAR a-na ṣí-ib-tim a-la-qé-ma KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-sú {PN1_TL} ú-ma-lá
tr: The rest of the silver I will (then) borrow at interest and the silver and the interest on it {PN1_TR} will compensate.
notes: Borrowing remainder at interest with compensation.

tr: Concerning {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR}.
notes: Short reference to two parties involved.

tr: Concerning {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er {PN1_TL} {PN2_TL} i-šu-ú ù {AMT2_TL} ri-ik-sí ša qá-nu-we ra-bi-ú-tim a-dí {DEADLINE_TL} u4-me-e ú-ṣa-ba-am
tr: {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN2_TR}, and he will add {AMT2_TR} large bundles of reeds within {DEADLINE_TR} days.
notes: Mixed debt: silver plus reeds with day deadline.

tl: {AMT_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu iš-tù {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tum i-ma-lu-ú-ni {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu
tr: They must pay {AMT_TR} in {DEADLINE_TR} weeks; after {DEADLINE_TR} weeks have passed they must pay {AMT_TR} of silver within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
notes: Installment payment: repeated payments at equal intervals.

tl: KIŠIB {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} KIŠIB {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} ša {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {PN5_TL} {PN6_TL} i-šu
tr: Seal of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, seal of {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}, that {PN5_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN6_TR}.
notes: Seal + debt in opening line. Combined formula common in debt tablets.

tl: KIŠIB {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} KIŠIB {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} ša hu-bu-ul {PN5_TL} DUMU {PN6_TL}
tr: Seal of {PN1_TR}, son of {PN2_TR}, seal of {PN3_TR}, son of {PN4_TR}, about the debt of {PN5_TR} son of {PN6_TR}.
notes: Seal + debt reference (hubul). Common debt tablet opening.

tl: KIŠIB {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} KIŠIB {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} ša ší-tí ša hu-bu-ul {PN5_TL}
tr: Seal of {PN1_TR}, son of {PN2_TR}, seal of {PN3_TR}, son of {PN4_TR}, of the remainder of the debt of {PN5_TR}.
notes: Seal + remainder of debt. Partial settlement context.

tl: KIŠIB {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} KIŠIB {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} ša {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am be-ú-lá-at {PN5_TL}
tr: Seal of {PN1_TR}, son of {PN2_TR}, seal of {PN3_TR}, son of {PN4_TR}, about {AMT_TR} of refined silver, the working capital of {PN5_TR}.
I gave it to him in {PLACE_TR}.
in the City {PN1_TR} will give the silver to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Payment in the City (Assur) from one person to another.

tr: At the time of the threshing he will weigh out pure copper of {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Pure copper of specific origin, paid at threshing.

tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver is owed by the ladies.
{AMT_TR} of silver due from {PN1_TR}, who took wool.
notes: Silver owed from someone who took wool.

tl: ša {AMT_TL} AN.NA ša ni-ip-lá-tim ša {PN1_TL} a-na ILLAT-tim ha-bu-lu AN.NA {PN2_TL} iš-qú-ul
tr: Concerning the {AMT_TR} of tin from the balance payment that {PN1_TR} owes to the caravan – {PN2_TR} has paid the tin.
notes: Third party pays caravan debt on behalf of debtor.

tr: 1 kutanu-textile belonging to {PN1_TR} remains in {PN2_TR}'s possession.
I paid {AMT_TR} of silver, {PN1_TR}'s fees.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na a-lá-ni ša-ar-ša-ra-ni áš-qú-ul-ma a-na {PN1_TL} a-dí-in
tr: I paid {AMT_TR} of silver for a sharšaranu-measure of acorns and gave them to {PN1_TR}.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ša ik-ri-bi ša {PN1_TL} i-ṣé-er {PN2_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL}
tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver, being temple funds, which {PN1_TR} had acquired as claim on {PN2_TR}, son of {PN3_TR}.
notes: Votive/temple-fund debt. ikribu = votive offering/temple fund.

tl: i-na ri-iš SÍG.HI.A ša i-ša-qú-lu-šu-ni {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: From the capital on the wool that they are going to pay to him, {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} shall give {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
Thereof he has given me {AMT_TR} of tin instead of {AMT2_TR}.
notes: Tin paid instead of copper at exchange rate.

tr: {AMT_TR} of wool and {AMT2_TR} of tin {PN1_TR} left with {PN2_TR}.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ù {AMT2_TL} KÙ.GI i-ší-im TÚG-ba-ti-a iš-tù {PLACE_TL} ub-lu-nim
tr: They brought me {AMT_TR} of silver and {AMT2_TR} of gold, the proceeds from my textiles, from {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Proceeds from textile sales brought from another city.

tr: {AMT_TR} {COMM_TR} the {PLACE_TR} colony took.
{PN2_TR} conducted {AMT_TR} of tin sealed by {PN1_TR} here.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} {PN3_TL} i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN4_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal-ma
tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} will pay {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN3_TR}, reckoned from the week of {PN4_TR} within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
notes: Full debt sentence: amount + debtor + creditor + week start + deadline. Very common single-line debt.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ITI.KAM i-ša-qal
tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver from the week of {PN1_TR}, son of {PN2_TR}, within {DEADLINE_TR} months he will pay.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim a-na {PLACE_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver he will pay in {DEADLINE_TR} weeks reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR}, to {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Debt with payment to specific place.

tl: a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim a-na A-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma iš-tí um-me-a-ni-šu {AMT_TL} KÙ.GI šu-mì {PN1_TL} i-lá-pá-at
tr: he must go to the City within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks and together with his investors he must book {AMT_TR} of gold in {PN1_TR}'s name.
notes: Obligation to go to Assur and book gold. Investment context.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {PN1_TL} {PN2_TL} i-šu ITI.KAM {MONTH_TL} li-mu-um {EPONYM_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL}
tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver {PN1_TR} owes to {PN2_TR}, month {MONTH_TR} eponymy of {EPONYM_TR}, son of {PN3_TR}.
notes: Debt declaration + date on same line.

tl: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} a-na 1 ma-na-im {RATE_TL} GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu
tr: From the week of {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} they will add per 1 mina {RATE_TR} shekels per month as interest.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am {PN1_TL} iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN2_TL} ú {PN3_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal-ma
tr: {PN1_TR} will pay {AMT_TR} of refined silver, reckoned from the week of {PN2_TR} and {PN3_TR} within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks,
notes: Full payment sentence: debtor pays refined silver from week of two officials within N weeks.

tl: ša {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {PN1_TL} ú {PN2_TL} {PN3_TL} i-šu-ú
tr: Concerning the fact that {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} owe {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Relative clause debt reference. Common when debt is topic of discussion.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu
tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of refined silver to a merchant.
{AMT_TR} of refined silver {PN1_TR} owes to the creditor.
notes: Debt to the creditor (tamkarum). Bearer holds the tablet.

tr: I gave {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN1_TR}'s wife.
notes: Payment to wife of a person.

tr: {PN1_TR} brought it away for purchases.

tl: {AMT_TL} TÚG.HI.A {PN1_TL} i-dí-in-ma URUDU a-na {PN2_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL} e-zi-ib
tr: {PN1_TR} sold {AMT_TR} textiles and left the copper for {PN2_TR} son of {PN3_TR}.
notes: Textile sale with copper proceeds left for someone.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am KI {PN1_TL} iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša {PN2_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim a-na {PN4_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver is owed by {PN1_TR}; he will pay in {DEADLINE_TR} weeks reckoned from the week eponymy of {PN2_TR}, son of {PN3_TR}, to {PN4_TR}.
notes: Full multi-clause debt: KI + week start + deadline + creditor.

tl: {AMT_TL} ší-ni-šu ší-né-en ša {PLACE_TL} SIG5 iš-tù {PLACE_TL} ú-šé-ba-lam
tr: From {PLACE_TR} he must send {AMT_TR} pairs of good shoes (made) in {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Obligation to send shoes from a place.

tr: (For) {AMT_TR} jars of wheat I paid {AMT2_TR} shekels.
notes: Purchase of wheat jars. DUG and GÍN units are embedded in TL; bare_number prevents doubled units.

tr: Furthermore, I gave {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN1_TR}.

tl: a-ha-ma {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na bé-a-lim a-na {PN1_TL} a-dí-in ma-aḫ-ri-šu-nu-ma
tr: {AMT_TR} of silver I gave as a working-capital to {PN1_TR} witnessed by the same men.
notes: Working capital given before same witnesses.

tl: a-na {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pí-im a-šu-mì {PN1_TL} a-na {PN2_TL} DUMU {PN3_TL} a-pu-ul
tr: I balanced for {AMT_TR} of refined silver because of {PN1_TR} with {PN2_TR} son of {PN3_TR}.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im {PLACE_TL} ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb
tr: If he does not pay when his term is up, he shall add interest in accordance with the rule of the {PLACE_TR} colony.
notes: Colony rate v2 with "he shall add" convention.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im {PLACE_TL} ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb
tr: If he does not pay when his term is up, he is to add interest in accordance with the rule of the {PLACE_TR} colony.
notes: Colony rate v2 with "he is to add" convention.

tl: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša {PN1_TL} {RATE_TL} GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
tr: From the week of {PN1_TR} he shall add {RATE_TR} shekel of silver as interest per month.
notes: Interest from week with "he shall add" convention.

tl: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša {PN1_TL} {RATE_TL} GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
tr: From the week of {PN1_TR} he is to add {RATE_TR} shekel of silver as interest per month.
notes: Interest from week with "he is to add" convention.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ṭup-pu-um a-num i-mu-at-ma {AMT_TL} {PN1_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: But if he has not paid, then this document is dead, and {PN1_TR} will have to pay {AMT_TR}.

tl: ṭup-pu-um ha-ar-mu-um ša hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
tr: A certified document concerning the debt of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} that may appear will be invalid.

tl: ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ša {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ša hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL}
tr: an encased document of {AMT_TR} of silver, being the debt of {PN1_TR}.
Month {MONTH_TR}, limmu {EPONYM_TR}.
Month {MONTH_TR}, limmu {EPONYM_TR} son of {PN1_TR}.
Year of {EPONYM_TR}.
According to his instructions I entrusted {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN1_TR}.
notes: According to (amala) variant of in accordance with.

tr: According to the tablet {PN1_TR} will pay {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: According to (ana mala) variant for document reference.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-ma-lá a-wa-at kà-ri-im {PLACE_TL} ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb
tr: If he does not pay, he will add interest according to the regulation of the {PLACE_TR} colony.
He shall pay within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
He shall pay {AMT_TR} of silver within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.

tl: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} a-na {DEADLINE_TL} ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
tr: Reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR} he shall pay within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
He shall pay at the {FEST_TR}.
He must pay within {DEADLINE_TR} weeks.
He must pay within {DEADLINE_TR} months.
He must pay to {PN1_TR} in {PLACE_TR}.
He must pay in {DEADLINE_TR} years.
As for {PN1_TR}'s debt of {AMT_TR} of refined silver.
As for {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR}.
notes: As for variant with two persons.

tr: As to {PN1_TR}'s debt of {AMT_TR} of refined silver.
As to {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
Regarding {PN1_TR}'s debt of {AMT_TR} of refined silver.
Regarding {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR}.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul {RATE_TL} GÍN.TA i-na ITI.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb
tr: If he does not pay, he shall add {RATE_TR} shekel per mina per month as interest.

tl: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na ṣí-ib-tim ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im {PLACE_TL} i-lá-ak-šu-um
tr: If he does not pay, interest will accrue to him in accordance with the rule of the {PLACE_TR} colony.
notes: Interest accrues (ilak-sum, alakum verb) variant. Different TL verb from usab.

tr: {PN2_TR} has a claim of {AMT_TR} of refined silver against {PN1_TR}.
notes: Creditor-first phrasing of i-ṣé-er debt formula. Same TL as debt_iser_silver_refined. Attested: 'Pè-ru-wa i-šu' → 'Peruwa has a claim of 13 ½ shekels of silver against Duda.'

tr: {PN3_TR} has a claim of {AMT_TR} of refined silver against {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Creditor-first with patronymic. Attested: 'Bu-za-zu i-šu-ú' → 'Buzāzu has a claim of 1 ⅔ minas of refined silver against Uṣur-ša-Aššur.'

tr: {PN2_TR} has a claim of {AMT_TR} of copper against {PN1_TR}.
notes: Creditor-first for copper. Attested: 'A-šur-ta-ak-la-ku i-šu' → 'Aššur-taklāku has a claim of 2 ½ talents and 3 minas of refined copper on Puzur-Ištar.'

tr: The merchant has a claim of {AMT_TR} of refined silver against {PN1_TR}.
notes: Merchant as creditor. Attested: '11 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er Im-li-ik-i-li-im DAM.GÀR i-šu' → 'The merchant has claim against Ímlik-ilum.'
